name: claude-theme-marketplace
description: Author one theme, apply it across Claude everywhere — the claude.ai browser UI, the Claude Code CLI, and Warp. White-label theming to apply, preview, and build custom themes.

plugins.name: whitelabel-theme
plugins.description: Author one theme, apply it across Claude everywhere — the claude.ai browser UI, Claude Code terminal colors, and Warp. Apply, preview, list, reset, and build white-label themes; commands wrap the zero-dependency `claude-whitelabel-themes` CLI (via npx).
